title: Claw City Lies in Ruins
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on claw city lies in ruins within the Climbing the Elephant storyline.
scene: Luffy's group climbs Zunesha, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro behind them, then enters the empty and damaged Mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The lesser drinks appear to have passed straight through the gates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap, this country is a total mess!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There isn't even the faintest smell of gunpowder here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I've got a bad feeling about this...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why can't we ever explore some place peaceful that doesn't make my skin crawl...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Eh!? What now!? You guys heard something?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to deal with the intruders in the "Whale's forest"!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The Mink-tribe is in the middle of a raid! But could it be...has Nami perhaps...?

summary: Claw City Lies in Ruins: Luffy's group reaches the country on Zunesha's back, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro temporarily, and discovers that Zou has already been devastated.
